title: Continuing Professional Development
text:
Preface
This book is used to track my Continuing Professional Development (CPD) as part of the Royal Statistics Society requirement for members seeking chartership or other qualifications.
It is also a cookbook for techniques.
These notes are purely my own, are unlikely to be verified and could contain errors.

Given me an appreciation of quarto setup in Github which I am not very familiar. Quarto is becoming a popular reporting method in industry and I was keen to maintain records here to develop quorto and github knowledge independently
